betterquesting:10.desc:8:
This is the first mandatory large processing line. It can be a pain to setup, and you'll need a LOT of platinum throughout the pack. Pin everything you need to JEI and be methodical, and youll find that a significant portion of the inputs recycle back to be used again, which makes this deceptively simple once you have it running.

Your first Platinum Metalic Powder can be obtained from processing purified nickel ore.
